name: Fennel Salad
intro: I like to use the male fennel, which is slightly longer in shape and thinner. I find them more tender.

ingredients.item: fennel bulbs (use the longer, thinner male fennel bulb)

method: Cut the fennel bulb in half lengthways and slice as thinly as possible. Mix the remaining ingredients together well to make a sauce and pour over the fennel. Chop some of the fennel’s fine green leaves and sprinkle over the salad.
This is a very fresh and crunchy salad ideally served with fish – for instance Pesce al Sale – as one of the vegetables, or you can serve it as part of an antipasto.
